mapper.select:
select A.DM_ID ,A.DM_NM ,A.DM_SYS_CD ,(select SYS_NM from TB_SYS_INFO where sys_cd = A.DM_SYS_CD) as DM_SYS_NM ,A.DM_DS_ID ,(select DSN from ndata.TB_DATA_SOURCE where ds_id = A.DM_DS_ID) as DM_DS_NM ,A.VER ,B.DM_CLCT_ID ,COALESCE(B.OBJ_CNT,0) as OBJ_CNT ,COALESCE(B.ATTR_CNT,0) as ATTR_CNT ,to_char(to_timestamp(B.CLCT_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as CLCT_DT from TB_DATA_MODEL A LEFT OUTER JOIN ( select S.DM_ID, S.OBJ_CNT, S.ATTR_CNT, T.DM_CLCT_ID, T.CLCT_END_DT as CLCT_DT from TB_DATA_MODEL_STATS S, TB_DATA_MODEL_CLCT T where S.DM_CLCT_ID = T.DM_CLCT_ID and T.CLCT_END_DT = (select max(CLCT_END_DT) from TB_DATA_MODEL_CLCT where DM_ID = S.DM_ID) ) B on A.DM_ID = B.DM_ID where A.USE_YN = 'Y'
AND A.DM_NM ILIKE '%' || #{schNm} || '%'
AND A.DM_SYS_CD in (select SYS_CD from TB_SYS_INFO where SYS_NM ILIKE '%' || #{schSysNm} || '%')
order by A.DM_NM

select A.DM_ID ,A.DM_NM ,A.DM_SYS_CD ,(select SYS_NM from TB_SYS_INFO where sys_cd = A.DM_SYS_CD) as DM_SYS_NM ,A.DM_DS_ID ,(select DSN from ndata.TB_DATA_SOURCE where ds_id = A.DM_DS_ID) as DM_DS_NM ,A.VER ,B.DM_CLCT_ID ,COALESCE(B.OBJ_CNT,0) as OBJ_CNT ,COALESCE(B.ATTR_CNT,0) as ATTR_CNT ,to_char(to_timestamp(B.CLCT_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as CLCT_DT from TB_DATA_MODEL A INNER JOIN ( select S.DM_ID, S.OBJ_CNT, S.ATTR_CNT, T.DM_CLCT_ID, T.CLCT_END_DT as CLCT_DT from TB_DATA_MODEL_STATS S, TB_DATA_MODEL_CLCT T where S.DM_CLCT_ID = T.DM_CLCT_ID) B on A.DM_ID = B.DM_ID where A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND B.DM_CLCT_ID = #{clctId}

select T.DM_CLCT_ID as clctId ,M.DM_ID as dataModelId ,M.DM_NM as dataModelNm ,M.DM_SYS_CD as dataModelSysCd ,(select SYS_NM from TB_SYS_INFO where sys_cd = M.DM_SYS_CD) as dataModelSysNm ,M.DM_DS_ID as dataModelDsId ,(select DSN from ndata.TB_DATA_SOURCE where ds_id = M.DM_DS_ID) as dataModelDsNm ,M.VER as dataModelVer ,to_char(to_timestamp(T.CLCT_START_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as clctStartDt ,to_char(to_timestamp(T.CLCT_END_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as clctEndDt ,T.CLCT_CMPTN_YN as clctCmptnYn from TB_DATA_MODEL M LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_DATA_MODEL_CLCT T on M.DM_ID = T.DM_ID and CLCT_END_DT = (select max(CLCT_END_DT) from TB_DATA_MODEL_CLCT where DM_ID = M.DM_ID) where M.USE_YN = 'Y'
AND M.DM_ID = #{schId}
AND M.DM_NM ILIKE '%' || #{schNm} || '%'
AND M.DM_SYS_CD in (select SYS_CD from TB_SYS_INFO where SYS_NM ILIKE '%' || #{schSysNm} || '%')
order by T.CLCT_END_DT DESC NULLS LAST
select OBJ_NM as objNm ,OBJ_NM_KR as objNmKr ,OBJ_OWNER as objOwner ,OBJ_DESC as objDesc ,OBJ_ATTR_CNT as objAttrCnt from TB_DATA_MODEL_OBJ where DM_CLCT_ID = #{clctId} order by OBJ_NM

select A.OBJ_NM ,(select OBJ_NM_KR from TB_DATA_MODEL_OBJ where DM_CLCT_ID = A.DM_CLCT_ID and OBJ_NM = A.OBJ_NM) as OBJ_NM_KR ,A.ATTR_NM ,A.ATTR_NM_KR ,A.DATA_TYPE ,A.DATA_LEN ,A.DATA_DECIMAL_LEN ,A.TERMS_STND_YN ,A.DOMAIN_STND_YN ,A.WORD_LST ,A.WORD_STND_LST ,A.NULLABLE_YN ,A.PK_YN ,A.FK_YN ,A.DEFAULT_VAL from TB_DATA_MODEL_ATTR A where A.DM_CLCT_ID = #{clctId} order by A.OBJ_NM, A.ATTR_ORD

SELECT A.OBJ_NM AS "tableNm", A.ATTR_NM AS "columnNm", A.DATA_TYPE AS "dataType", A.DATA_LEN AS "dataLen", A.NULLABLE_YN AS "nullableYn" FROM TB_DATA_MODEL_ATTR A WHERE A.DM_CLCT_ID = #{clctId} ORDER BY A.OBJ_NM, A.ATTR_NM
mapper.delete:
UPDATE TB_DATA_MODEL SET USE_YN = 'N' WHERE DM_ID IN
#{item.dataModelId}
mapper.select: SELECT DM_ID as dataModelId ,SCHEMA_NM as schemaNm ,USE_YN as useYn FROM TB_DATA_MODEL_SCHEMA WHERE DM_ID = #{dataModelId} ORDER BY SCHEMA_NM
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_DATA_MODEL_STATS ( DM_CLCT_ID ,DM_ID ,OBJ_CNT ,ATTR_CNT ,TERMS_STND_RATE ,DOMAIN_STND_RATE ,WORD_STND_RATE ) SELECT A.DM_CLCT_ID ,A.DM_ID ,COUNT(A.OBJ_NM) ,SUM(A.OBJ_ATTR_CNT) ,0 ,0 ,0 FROM TB_DATA_MODEL_OBJ A WHERE A.DM_CLCT_ID = #{clctId} AND A.DM_ID = #{dataModelId} GROUP BY A.DM_CLCT_ID, A.DM_ID
